content:
🚨 We're Hiring | Legal Associate (Title Search & Property Due Diligence) – Patna 🚨

S.K. Law Office is looking for a motivated Legal Associate to join our Patna Branch.

🔹 Position: Legal Associate
🔹 Location: Patna, Bihar
🔹 Freshers are welcome 
🔹 Salary: As per industry standards

Key Responsibilities:

✅ Conduct title searches and property due diligence.
✅ Examine title deeds, sale deeds, gift deeds, partition deeds, and related documents.
✅ Verify ownership history and chain of title.
✅ Review land, revenue, and registration records.
✅ Draft and prepare Title Search Reports and legal opinions.
✅ Identify legal risks, encumbrances, and title defects.

Eligibility:

✔ LL.B. degree from a recognized university
✔ Strong legal research and drafting skills
✔ Interest in property law, real estate transactions, and title verification
✔ Attention to detail and analytical mindset

This is an excellent opportunity for law graduates seeking hands-on experience in property law, banking due diligence, and title investigation work.

📩 Interested candidates may send their updated resume to lawofficesk6@gmail.com

Building Legal Excellence Through Precision and Professionalism.

Freshers are encouraged to apply!

#Hiring #LegalJobs #LegalAssociate #PropertyLaw #TitleSearch
